feature: Brain Inbox — Task Queue for Supervisor Loop
description: Brain daemon drains a task queue each tick. Users/agents enqueue work via hex brain enqueue. Task types: hex-command, workplan, shell. SpacetimeDB-backed for persistence.

phases.name: Brain task storage (HexFlo memory)
phases.description: Use HexFlo memory with brain-task: key prefix — no new SpacetimeDB reducer needed, reuses existing infrastructure.

tasks.name: Brain task enqueue/list/drain via HexFlo memory
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/brain.rs: add enqueue_brain_task(kind, payload), list_brain_tasks(status_filter), drain_brain_tasks(limit) — all use HexFlo memory with keys brain-task:{uuid}. Value is JSON with {kind, payload, status, created_at, completed_at, result}.

phases.name: CLI commands: enqueue, queue list/clear/drain
phases.description: hex brain enqueue <kind> <payload>, hex brain queue list/clear/drain.

tasks.name: Add Enqueue and Queue subcommands to BrainAction
tasks.description: Add BrainAction::Enqueue { kind: String, payload: String } and BrainAction::Queue { #[command(subcommand)] action: QueueAction }. QueueAction: List, Clear, Drain. Wire into run() match.

phases.name: Daemon drains queue each tick
phases.description: Each daemon tick: after validate, fetch up to N pending tasks and execute them sequentially.

tasks.name: Daemon tick body: drain brain queue
tasks.description: In daemon() tick: after validate(), call drain_brain_tasks(limit=1). For each task, execute based on kind: hex-command=shell 'hex {payload}', workplan=shell 'hex plan execute {payload}', shell=whitelist check + execute. Set status=completed/failed with result, write back to HexFlo memory. Print task progress to stdout.
